projects.name: Mimi's UI Studio
projects.description: A personal design-style library. Browse 8 page layouts and 8 button styles, customize the color, font and shape, then copy a ready-made prompt or the matching CSS code.

projects.name: Sip — Water & Liquid Tracker
projects.description: An installable web app (PWA) to track daily liquid intake against a goal, with calorie estimates, points and rewards. Saves on your device; add it to your home screen to use like a phone app.

projects.name: Sleep App
projects.description: A calming, mobile-friendly web app for ambient sounds (ocean, forest, snow), meditation music links, automatic night theming and a daily quote. Your settings are saved on your device.

projects.name: Learning & Certification Portfolio
projects.description: This very site — a dark, galaxy-themed portfolio to showcase projects and certifications, with password-protected editing and real-time updates across all devices, powered by a Firebase cloud backend.

projects.name: Inbox Tidy
projects.description: An AI assistant that keeps your Gmail tidy: it reads new mail, sorts it into labels, moves adverts to a holding folder and only deletes them after a safety delay. Starred emails are never touched.
